tagline.en: Tuck the garden into bed for winter!
tagline.da: Put haven i seng til vinteren!

theme.hero_task: Cover all beds with winter mulch and say goodnight

tasks.action: Spread winter mulch over all beds

prompt.en: Cover each bed with leaves or straw -- like tucking them in with a blanket!
prompt.da: Daek hvert bed med blade eller halm -- som at putte dem i seng med et taeppe!

tasks.action: Cut back raspberry canes in Bed B to ground level

prompt.en: Autumn Bliss fruits on new wood -- cut all canes to the ground. Fresh ones grow in spring!
prompt.da: Autumn Bliss baerer frugt paa nyt trae -- skaer alle staengler til jorden. Nye gror til foraar!

tasks.action: Final kale harvest if any leaves remain in Bed C

prompt.en: The very last harvest of the year! Thank you, garden!
prompt.da: Den allerlaeste hoest i aar! Tak, have!

tasks.action: Clean and store tools for winter

prompt.en: Wash tools, dry them, and put them away. The garden sleeps now.
prompt.da: Vask vaerktoej, toer det, og laeg det vaek. Haven sover nu.

tasks.action: Make a 'what we grew this year' poster together

prompt.en: Draw or paste photos of everything you grew this year! Count how many different things!
prompt.da: Tegn eller klaeb billeder af alt du har dyrket i aar! Tael hvor mange forskellige ting!

growth_events.event: Kale may survive into November if not too cold

prompt.en: The kale might keep going! Check it next week too -- it's the toughest plant in the garden.
prompt.da: Groenkaalen bliver maaske ved! Tjek den ogsaa naeste uge -- den er den sejeste plante i haven.

growth_events.event: Thyme staying green through first frosts -- evergreen herb

prompt.en: Thyme is still here! Pick a sprig and crush it -- still smells amazing!
prompt.da: Timian er stadig her! Pluk en kvist og knus den -- dufter stadig fantastisk!
